### Welcome to the Curious Souls Café! ☕🌍

Thank you for helping us map the world's curiosities! Before we can add your question to the official deck, please complete the checklist below by replacing the `[ ]` with an `[x]`.

**Formatting Check:**

- [ ] I added the `[Online]` tag at the end of my question.
- [ ] I avoided sensitive topics (e.g., politics, religion) and personal information.

**Community Agreement (Required):**

- [ ] I confirm I wrote this question (or it's public domain) and I'm happy to gift it to the Curious Souls Café community! I give you permission to share it in your app, website, repository, and other media under your [License](https://github.com/curioussoulscafe/global-curiosities/blob/main/LICENSE), [Privacy Terms](https://curioussouls.cafe/privacy).

---

_Optional: Have you discussed this question with friends, or at an event? Let us know how it went!_
